// ══════════════════════════════════════════════ // SEQUENCE ADMIN // ══════════════════════════════════════════════ const SEQ_ELEMENT_LABELS = { title:'Título', subtitle:'Subtítulo', text:'Texto', photos:'Fotos', videos:'Videos' }; function buildSeqEditor(sectionId) { const container = document.getElementById('seq-editor-' + sectionId); if (!container) return; const seqs = getSeqs(sectionId); if (!seqs.length) { container.innerHTML = '

Sin secuencias. Agregá una abajo.

'; return; } container.innerHTML = seqs.map((seq, si) => buildSeqAdminCard(sectionId, seq, si)).join(''); initSeqDrag(sectionId); initOrderDrag(sectionId); } function buildSeqAdminCard(sectionId, seq, si) { const order = seq.order || ['title','subtitle','text','photos','videos']; const orderChips = order.map(el => '' + SEQ_ELEMENT_LABELS[el] + '' ).join(''); const photosPreview = (seq.photos||[]).map((url,pi) => '
' ).join(''); const videosList = (seq.videos||[]).map((url,vi) => '
' + '' + '
' ).join(''); return '
' + '

'; } function addSeq(sectionId) { if (!siteData.sections) siteData.sections = {}; if (!siteData.sections[sectionId]) siteData.sections[sectionId] = []; siteData.sections[sectionId].push(newSeq()); buildSeqEditor(sectionId); } function delSeq(sectionId, si) { if (!confirm('¿Eliminar esta secuencia?')) return; siteData.sections[sectionId].splice(si, 1); buildSeqEditor(sectionId); } function addSeqVideo(sectionId, si) { siteData.sections[sectionId][si].videos.push(''); buildSeqEditor(sectionId); } function delSeqVideo(sectionId, si, vi) { siteData.sections[sectionId][si].videos.splice(vi, 1); buildSeqEditor(sectionId); } async function handleSeqPhotos(input, sectionId, si) { const files = Array.from(input.files); for (const file of files) { const b64 = await fileToBase64(file); siteData.sections[sectionId][si].photos.push(b64); } buildSeqEditor(sectionId); } function delSeqPhoto(sectionId, si, pi) { siteData.sections[sectionId][si].photos.splice(pi, 1); buildSeqEditor(sectionId); } function readSeqFromForm(sectionId) { const seqs = getSeqs(sectionId); seqs.forEach((seq, si) => { const tEl = document.getElementById('seq_title_' + sectionId + '_' + si); const sEl = document.getElementById('seq_sub_' + sectionId + '_' + si); const xEl = document.getElementById('seq_text_' + sectionId + '_' + si); if (tEl) { if (!seq.title) seq.title = {}; seq.title.es = tEl.value; } if (sEl) { if (!seq.subtitle) seq.subtitle = {}; seq.subtitle.es = sEl.value; } if (xEl) { if (!seq.text) seq.text = {}; seq.text.es = xEl.value; } // Read videos seq.videos = (seq.videos||[]).map((_, vi) => { const vEl = document.getElementById('vid_' + sectionId + '_' + si + '_' + vi); return vEl ? vEl.value.trim() : ''; }).filter(Boolean); // Read order from chips const card = document.querySelector('.seq-admin-card[data-si="' + si + '"][data-section="' + sectionId + '"]'); if (card) { const chips = card.querySelectorAll('.seq-order-chip'); seq.order = Array.from(chips).map(c => c.dataset.el); } }); } async function translateSeqs(sectionId) { const langs = ['en','fr','de','pt','ca','ar']; const msgEl = document.getElementById('translateMsg' + sectionId.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + sectionId.slice(1)); if (msgEl) { msgEl.textContent = 'Traduciendo...'; msgEl.className = 'translate-msg'; } readSeqFromForm(sectionId); try { const seqs = getSeqs(sectionId); for (const seq of seqs) { for (const l of langs) { if (seq.title?.es) { if(!seq.title[l]) seq.title[l] = await translateText(seq.title.es, l); } if (seq.subtitle?.es) { if(!seq.subtitle[l]) seq.subtitle[l] = await translateText(seq.subtitle.es, l); } if (seq.text?.es) { if(!seq.text[l]) seq.text[l] = await translateText(seq.text.es, l); } } } if (msgEl) { msgEl.textContent = '✓ Traducción completa'; msgEl.className = 'translate-msg ok'; setTimeout(() => { if(msgEl) { msgEl.textContent=''; msgEl.className='translate-msg'; } }, 3000); } } catch(e) { if (msgEl) { msgEl.textContent = '✗ Error: ' + e.message; msgEl.className = 'translate-msg err'; } } } async function saveSeqs(sectionId) { readSeqFromForm(sectionId); renderFixedSections(); try { showDiag('Guardando ' + sectionId + '...'); await fbPut('/sections/' + sectionId, siteData.sections[sectionId]); const msg = document.getElementById('saveMsg-' + sectionId); if (msg) { msg.classList.add('show'); setTimeout(() => msg.classList.remove('show'), 2500); } showDiag('✅ Guardado', 'green'); } catch(e) { showDiag('❌ Error: ' + e.message, 'red'); } } // Drag & drop for sequences within editor function initSeqDrag(sectionId) { const cards = document.querySelectorAll('.seq-admin-card[data-section="' + sectionId + '"]'); let dragSrc = null; cards.forEach(card => { card.addEventListener('dragstart', e => { dragSrc = card; setTimeout(() => card.style.opacity='.4', 0); }); card.addEventListener('dragend', () => card.style.opacity='1'); card.addEventListener('dragover', e => { e.preventDefault(); card.classList.add('drag-over'); }); card.addEventListener('dragleave', () => card.classList.remove('drag-over')); card.addEventListener('drop', e => { e.preventDefault(); card.classList.remove('drag-over'); if (!dragSrc || dragSrc === card) return; const si = parseInt(dragSrc.dataset.si); const ti = parseInt(card.dataset.si); const seqs = siteData.sections[sectionId]; const [moved] = seqs.splice(si, 1); seqs.splice(ti, 0, moved); buildSeqEditor(sectionId); }); }); } // Drag & drop for order chips within a sequence function initOrderDrag(sectionId) { document.querySelectorAll('.seq-admin-card[data-section="' + sectionId + '"] .seq-order-row').forEach(row => { const chips = row.querySelectorAll('.seq-order-chip'); let dragChip = null; chips.forEach(chip => { chip.addEventListener('dragstart', e => { dragChip = chip; e.stopPropagation(); setTimeout(()=>chip.style.opacity='.4',0); }); chip.addEventListener('dragend', () => chip.style.opacity='1'); chip.addEventListener('dragover', e => { e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); chip.classList.add('drag-over'); }); chip.addEventListener('dragleave', () => chip.classList.remove('drag-over')); chip.addEventListener('drop', e => { e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); chip.classList.remove('drag-over'); if (!dragChip || dragChip === chip) return; const parent = chip.parentNode; const chipsArr = Array.from(parent.querySelectorAll('.seq-order-chip')); const si2 = chipsArr.indexOf(dragChip); const ti2 = chipsArr.indexOf(chip); if (si2 < ti2) parent.insertBefore(dragChip, chip.nextSibling); else parent.insertBefore(dragChip, chip); }); }); }); }
